description: SKY130 latch-up design-rule deck. All distances in micrometres (µm).
sources: SKY130A latch-up rule LU.x from SkyWater DRC deck

well_tap.description: Every nwell must have a tap to VDD, and every p-substrate region must have a tap to VSS, within max_distance_um. Taps are identified by the 'tap' layer (GDS 65/44).
well_tap.note: SKY130 spec 15–25 µm; we enforce the tighter 15 µm as default. Waiver layer areaid.lowTapDensity (GDS 81/14) overrides this limit.

np_adjacency.description: n+ source/drain (nsdm) regions must not sit closer than min_separation_um to p+ source/drain (psdm) regions across an nwell boundary. Regions on the same side of a well boundary (both in nwell or both in psub) are exempt.
np_adjacency.note: SKY130 LU.3 / LU.4: minimum n+/p+ separation across well boundary ≈ 0.84 µm (nwell width minimum). Closer than this risks parasitic bipolar latch-up.
